name: Linear
description: Modern issue tracking and project management tool for software teams, with a fast native desktop app

version_check.url: Likely uses electron-updater with auto-update endpoint at https://linear.app/api/update or similar — exact URL not publicly documented

extraction.pattern: BLOCKED or undocumented — electron-updater endpoint not publicly confirmed

version_check.fallback: Scrape https://linear.app/download for version string, or check changelog page

notes: Electron-based desktop app. Uses electron-updater framework , update API endpoint is not publicly documented. Version can be inferred from changelog or download page scraping. Universal binary. SaaS product with free and paid team plans.
